details: The agent executed appropriate commands to retrieve PR details, check runs, comments, and review comments. It correctly identified the PR title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, and provided accurate CI results (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped from 30 visible checks out of 41 total). The agent correctly summarized the Greptile bot comment and noted no human review comments existed. All data was derived from actual command output rather than hallucinated.
